name: R-Awareness
description: SSoT document injector for ResonantOS — curated always-on context

ssotRoot.label: SSoT Root
ssotRoot.help: Absolute path to the SSoT directory

alwaysOnDocs.label: Always-On Documents
alwaysOnDocs.help: Relative paths (from ssotRoot) of docs injected every turn

tokenBudget.label: Token Budget
tokenBudget.help: Max estimated tokens of injected content per turn

refreshEveryNTurns.label: Refresh Interval
refreshEveryNTurns.help: Re-read files from disk every N turns (default: 10)
